query:
ALTER TABLE card_batches 
ADD COLUMN enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN simultaneousUse INT DEFAULT 1,
ADD COLUMN cardTimeValue INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN cardTimeUnit ENUM('hours', 'days') DEFAULT 'hours',
ADD COLUMN internetTimeValue INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN internetTimeUnit ENUM('hours', 'days') DEFAULT 'hours',
ADD COLUMN timeFromActivation BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
ADD COLUMN hotspotPort VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN macBinding BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN prefix VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN usernameLength INT DEFAULT 6,
ADD COLUMN passwordLength INT DEFAULT 4,
ADD COLUMN cardPrice DECIMAL(10, 2),
ADD COLUMN updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
